name: aurora-ai-sources
title: Aurora AI Sources
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native sources parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects its declared dependencies to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/sources.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-badge`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-ai-source`.
